ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation code used */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation was run */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., completed, failed, pending) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation */,
  "run_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the simulation in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation code */,
  "code_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation code */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the simulation code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation code */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the simulation code */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation code was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the simulation code was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run that produced the dataset */,
  "path" TEXT /* Path to the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, HDF5) */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dimensions" (
  "dim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dimension */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "dimension" TEXT /* Name of the dimension (e.g., None, wall.time) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dimension */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the dimension (e.g., seconds, meters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., None, STRUCTURE, STR_0D) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the data (e.g., None, INT_1D) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the data type (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_history" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation code */,
  "commit_ref" TEXT /* Unique commit reference */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date of the commit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_history_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("code_id") REFERENCES simulation_codes ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output flag */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "output_flag" INTEGER /* Output flag (e.g., 0, 1, -1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the output flag */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the output flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_outputs_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameters_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plasma_data" (
  "plasma_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plasma data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "plasma_type" TEXT /* Type of plasma data (e.g., temperature, density) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the plasma data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plasma data */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the plasma data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plasma_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plasma_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES datasets ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wall_data" (
  "wall_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wall data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "wall_type" TEXT /* Type of wall data (e.g., material, thickness) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the wall data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wall data */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the wall data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wall_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wall_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES datasets ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES datasets ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_code_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation code */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_code_parameters_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("code_id") REFERENCES simulation_codes ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_teams_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_code_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation code */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the simulation code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_code_versions_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("code_id") REFERENCES simulation_codes ("code_id")
)
